1<?php
2
3namespace Local\Permission\Models;
4
5use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
6use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsToMany;
7use Illuminate\Support\Collection;
8use InvalidArgumentException;
9use Local\Permission\Support\PermissionRegistry;
10
11/**
12 * @property int $id
13 * @property int|string|null $tenant_id Null = global role (the only value
14 *                                      anything sets today). A host app may use this to scope a role
15 *                                      to one tenant once it needs custom per-tenant roles — this
16 *                                      package makes no assumption about tenancy being enabled at all.
17 * @property string $name
18 * @property string $guard_name
19 * @property ?string $description
20 */
21class Role extends Model
22{
23    protected $guarded = ['id'];
24
25    protected static function booted(): void
26    {
27        static::creating(function (self $role) {
28            $role->guard_name ??= static::defaultGuardName();
29        });
30
31        static::saved(fn () => app(PermissionRegistry::class)->forgetCache());
32        static::deleted(fn () => app(PermissionRegistry::class)->forgetCache());
33    }
34
35    public function __construct(array $attributes = [])
36    {
37        parent::__construct($attributes);
38
39        $this->table = config('permission.table_names.roles', 'roles');
40    }
41
42    public function permissions(): BelongsToMany
43    {
44        return $this->belongsToMany(
45            Permission::class,
46            config('permission.table_names.role_has_permissions'),
47            'role_id',
48            'permission_id'
49        );
50    }
51
52    /**
53     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
54     */
55    public function givePermissionTo(...$permissions): static
56    {
57        $this->permissions()->syncWithoutDetaching($this->resolvePermissionIds($permissions));
58        app(PermissionRegistry::class)->forgetCache();
59
60        return $this;
61    }
62
63    /**
64     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
65     */
66    public function revokePermissionTo(...$permissions): static
67    {
68        $this->permissions()->detach($this->resolvePermissionIds($permissions));
69        app(PermissionRegistry::class)->forgetCache();
70
71        return $this;
72    }
73
74    /**
75     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
76     */
77    public function syncPermissions(...$permissions): static
78    {
79        $this->permissions()->sync($this->resolvePermissionIds($permissions));
80        app(PermissionRegistry::class)->forgetCache();
81
82        return $this;
83    }
84
85    public function hasPermissionTo(string|Permission $permission): bool
86    {
87        $name = $permission instanceof Permission ? $permission->name : $permission;
88
89        return $this->permissions->contains('name', $name);
90    }
91
92    public static function findByName(string $name, ?string $guardName = null): self
93    {
94        $guardName ??= static::defaultGuardName();
95
96        $role = static::query()->where('name', $name)->where('guard_name', $guardName)->first();
97
98        if ($role === null) {
99            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Role [{$name}] does not exist.");
100        }
101
102        return $role;
103    }
104
105    public static function findOrCreate(string $name, ?string $guardName = null): self
106    {
107        $guardName ??= static::defaultGuardName();
108
109        return static::query()->firstOrCreate(
110            ['name' => $name, 'guard_name' => $guardName]
111        );
112    }
113
114    protected static function defaultGuardName(): string
115    {
116        return config('auth.defaults.guard', 'web');
117    }
118
119    /**
120     * @param  array<int, string|Permission>  $permissions
121     * @return array<int, int>
122     */
123    protected function resolvePermissionIds(array $permissions): array
124    {
125        return Collection::make($permissions)
126            ->flatten()
127            ->map(fn (string|Permission $permission) => $permission instanceof Permission
128                ? $permission->id
129                : Permission::findOrCreate($permission)->id)
130            ->all();
131    }
132}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable

Generated by php-code-coverage 12.5.7 using PHP 8.4.23 and PHPUnit 12.5.30 at Mon Jul 20 14:27:51 UTC 2026.
